app.name: AI Reverse Tutor
app.description: An intelligent platform that interviews students, detects knowledge gaps, and creates personalized learning roadmaps powered by AI.

landing.hero_subtitle: AI Reverse Tutor interviews you, identifies knowledge gaps, and creates a personalized roadmap to mastery.
landing.features_subtitle: Experience a revolutionary approach to learning that adapts to your needs.
landing.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of learners who are mastering topics faster with AI-powered interviews.
landing.footer_copyright: © 2026 AI Reverse Tutor. All rights reserved.
landing.how_it_works_desc: AI Reverse Tutor uses a four-step process to transform how you learn.
landing.step1_desc: Select what you want to learn

topics.title: Choose Your Topic
topics.subtitle: Select a topic to assess your knowledge
topics.confidence: How confident are you in this topic?
topics.no_topics: No topics found matching your search.
topics.learn_first_hint: Learn first via chat, then start assessment when ready
topics.python_basics_desc: Variables, data types, control flow, and basic syntax
topics.functions_desc: Function definition, parameters, return values, and scope
topics.oop_desc: Classes, objects, inheritance, polymorphism, and encapsulation
topics.decorators_desc: Function decorators, class decorators, and metaprogramming
topics.data_structures_desc: Arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, and hash tables
topics.algorithms_desc: Sorting, searching, dynamic programming, and graph algorithms
topics.react_basics_desc: Components, props, state, and lifecycle methods
topics.sql_desc: Queries, joins, normalization, and database design
topics.javascript_desc: ES6, async/await, closures, and event handling
topics.typescript_desc: Type system, interfaces, generics, and advanced types
topics.git_desc: Branching, commits, merge strategies, and collaboration
topics.rest_api_desc: HTTP methods, status codes, authentication, and design patterns
topics.html_css_desc: Semantic HTML, flexbox, grid, and responsive design
topics.nodejs_desc: Express, middleware, streams, and event emitters
topics.mongodb_desc: Document models, aggregation pipelines, and indexing
topics.docker_desc: Images, containers, volumes, and Docker Compose
topics.aws_desc: EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, and core AWS concepts
topics.graphql_desc: Queries, mutations, subscriptions, and schema design
topics.testing_desc: Unit testing, integration testing, and test automation
topics.security_desc: Authentication, encryption, OWASP, and best practices
topics.performance_desc: Caching, profiling, optimization techniques, and best practices
topics.agile_desc: Sprints, ceremonies, user stories, and team practices

interview.title: Reverse Tutor Interview
interview.completed_message: Great job! You have completed all questions. View your results now.
interview.no_questions: No questions available for this topic.
interview.doubt_placeholder: Ask a doubt about this question...

results.title: Assessment Results
results.no_results_message: Complete an assessment to see your results.
results.detailed_metrics_placeholder: Detailed metrics for this assessment will be available here.

gaps.title: Knowledge Gap Analysis
gaps.subtitle: AI-identified strengths, weaknesses, and missing concepts
gaps.missing_description: Concepts that need to be learned
gaps.no_data_message: Complete an assessment to see your knowledge gap analysis.

roadmap.title: Your Personalized Learning Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: AI-generated learning plan tailored to your knowledge gaps
roadmap.no_roadmap: Complete an assessment to generate your personalized roadmap.

history.title: Assessment History
history.subtitle: View all your past assessments and track your progress

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your learning experience
settings.description: AI Reverse Tutor is an intelligent educational platform that uses AI to interview students, detect knowledge gaps, and create personalized learning roadmaps.
settings.built_with: Built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui
